name: get_patient_context
description: Retrieves the full health record for an elderly-care patient by phone number. Returns demographics, care status, phone check-ins, wearable data, health alerts, summary statistics, and configured check-in questions. Use at call start or when you need fresh patient context.

query_params_schema.description: The caller's phone number. Supplied automatically from the call - do not ask the patient for it.
